features: BIG BUTTON TELEPHONE – This white telephone is simple to use and features large, easy to read buttons for easy dialling. It is ideal for the visually impaired or any elderly relatives or friends who may have unsteady hands and need a bit of extra help when calling loved ones.
HANDS FREE AND ADJUSTABLE VOLUME – For your convenience and ease of use, the phone has a hands-free function and an adjustable volume to get a loud and clear sound while on a call.

NUMBER MEMORY AND REDIAL FUNCTION – With the number memory feature, you can store up to 10 two-touch numbers for automatic dialling. There is also a redial button so you can call back whoever you have last called.
DESK OR WALL MOUNTABLE – You can choose to either display this phone on a desk or table or mount it to your wall (please note - fixtures are not included).
BENROSS – Benross manufactures a multitude of electrical appliances. From extension cords and adapters, to heaters and coolers for the home, you can find it all at the Benross store on Amazon.
description: From the manufacturer Benross Big Button Telephone in White The phone features jumbo easy to see buttons for easy dialing especially if sight may be failing You can also use it via a hands free speaker phone setting if you wish You can save up to 10 numbers so you can type them in just two touches as well as access the last number redial Extremely easy to set up and use as well as to adjust to suit individual needs You can either place the phone on a desk or mount it on the wall if you want to White Jumbo Black Jumbo White Classic Black Classic White Slimline Black Slimline Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 595 4.0 out of 5 stars 595 3.0 out of 5 stars 14 4.0 out of 5 stars 3 4.0 out of 5 stars 595 4.0 out of 5 stars 595 Price £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £16.24 £ 16 . 24 — no data £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 Colour White Black White Black White Black Can it be wall mounted? ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Speed Dial ✓ ✓ no data no data no data no data Flash Button ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Corded? ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
